title: dillenia suffruticosa
intro: Dillenia suffruticosa, also known as the dwarf or small dillenia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Dilleniaceae. It is a shrub or small tree that is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and is used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves and roots of the plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, which are used to harness its health benefits and treat various ailments.
